verdict: The current PR #230 physics-loop campaign did not reach retained top-Yukawa closure.  It did retire the visible shortcut routes: Ward/H_unit, R_conn-only LSZ, Legendre normalization, free logdet bubble, contact HS/RPA, simplified ladder projector, same-1PI, and static/HQET without matching.  Remaining closure requires production evidence or a genuinely new scalar LSZ/heavy-matching theorem.
